purpose: Copy existing holdout feature manifest and replace its label columns from corrected parent-level holdout ground truth.
command:
$HCBBRoot = "human_talk_workspace\tata_v0.8_human_corrected_balanced_pipeline"
$OldHoldoutManifest = "human_talk_workspace\tata_v0.6_raw_pipeline\final_holdout_feature_cache\metadata\multilabel_features_manifest.csv"
$CorrectedHoldoutCsv = "$HCBBRoot\corrected_holdout\01_raw_final_holdout_GROUND_TRUTH_FINAL_v08_context_checked.csv"
$CorrectedHoldoutManifest = "$HCBBRoot\corrected_holdout\multilabel_features_manifest_CORRECTED_LABELS.csv"

$env:OLD_HOLDOUT_MANIFEST = $OldHoldoutManifest
$env:CORRECTED_HOLDOUT_CSV = $CorrectedHoldoutCsv
$env:CORRECTED_HOLDOUT_MANIFEST = $CorrectedHoldoutManifest

@'
import os
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
labels = ["Brene_Brown","Eckhart_Tolle","Eric_Thomas","Gary_Vee","Jay_Shetty","Nick_Vujicic","other_speaker_present","music_present","audience_reaction_present","silence_present"]
seg = pd.read_csv(Path(os.environ["OLD_HOLDOUT_MANIFEST"]), low_memory=False)
parent = pd.read_csv(Path(os.environ["CORRECTED_HOLDOUT_CSV"]), low_memory=False)
seg["parent_clip_id"] = seg["parent_clip_id"].astype(str)
parent["parent_clip_id"] = parent["parent_clip_id"].astype(str)
parent = parent.drop_duplicates("parent_clip_id", keep="last").set_index("parent_clip_id")
missing = sorted(set(seg["parent_clip_id"]) - set(parent.index))
if missing:
    raise RuntimeError(f"Missing corrected parent labels for {len(missing)} segment parent ids. Example: {missing[:5]}")
for lab in labels:
    seg[lab] = seg["parent_clip_id"].map(parent[lab]).astype(int)
seg["labels"] = seg.apply(lambda r: "|".join([lab for lab in labels if int(r[lab]) == 1]), axis=1)
seg["manual_labels"] = seg["labels"]
seg["num_active_labels"] = seg[labels].sum(axis=1).astype(int)
out = Path(os.environ["CORRECTED_HOLDOUT_MANIFEST"])
out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
seg.to_csv(out, index=False)
print(out, len(seg), seg["parent_clip_id"].nunique())
'@ | python -
key_output: Corrected holdout feature manifest: 4,335 segments / 867 parent clips.
